subject: F13 GREEN: implement tools/hsim_shm.py
description: Create tools/hsim_shm.py with parse_size(spec) -> int, select_mmap_dir(size) -> Path, allocate(size, prefix) -> Path. Single source of truth for size parsing + statvfs check + sparse-file mkstemp+truncate. Status line "[hsim mmap] X GiB at Y (free: Z GiB)" printed by allocate().
